message:
fix(demo): use saturating_sub to prevent underflow in modal rendering

Fixes potential arithmetic underflow in GuidedTour modal rendering:

Title rendering:
- modal_width - 4 → modal_width.saturating_sub(4)
- modal_width - 7 → modal_width.saturating_sub(7)
- modal_width - 2 → modal_width.saturating_sub(2)
- Refactored padding calculation using intermediate `available` variable

Tip rendering:
- content_width - 3 → content_width.saturating_sub(3)

When modal_width or content_width is small (e.g., in tests or unusual
terminal sizes), subtraction could underflow and cause panic in release
builds or wrap to large values. saturating_sub returns 0 instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
